Single manual sync endpoint: posts draft exposed POST /api/v1/posts/sync; github draft exposed POST /api/v1/github/sync. Reconciled to ONE endpoint /api/v1/github/sync (matches locked decision '/api/github/sync has no auth -> add JwtAuthGuard'). PostsSyncService/WorksSyncService are internal services the github domain calls in-process (NO HTTP self-fetch).

Sync preservation model diverged across 3 drafts: posts='promote source to manual on edit', works='field-ownership matrix (source immutable)', github='lockedFields[] array'. Reconciled to a UNIFIED model (§11.1): field-ownership matrix (default) + lockedFields (explicit admin pin) + source IMMUTABLE (no promotion; the posts promote-to-manual behavior is retired). Applied identically to posts and works.

Tombstone fragmentation: posts draft used a postBlocklist collection; works draft used githubsettings.suppressedGithubPaths. Reconciled (§11.2): BOTH posts and writes delete to the shared githubsettings.suppressedGithubPaths (paths disambiguate blogs/ vs works/). postBlocklist retained as read-only audit trail only.

Error envelope field name drift: scaffolding=requestId, content=none, works=correlationId, github=none. Reconciled to requestId (canonical, matches X-Request-Id header). correlationId is a retired alias.
Validation error code drift: scaffolding=VALIDATION_ERROR, content=VALIDATION, posts=VALIDATION_FAILED. Reconciled to VALIDATION_ERROR everywhere.

Throttle code drift: scaffolding global=TOO_MANY_REQUESTS, auth/posts/works per-route=RATE_LIMITED. Reconciled: global API throttle returns TOO_MANY_REQUESTS; per-route (login/refresh/upload) returns RATE_LIMITED + Retry-After.

published field conflict: github draft adds published:Boolean (for stale-unpublish); posts draft defers draft/publish to v2. Reconciled: published is ADDITIVE (default true), written ONLY by the sync stale-unpublish path (false), admin cannot toggle in v1.

readTime formula drift: posts=CJK-aware ceil(cjk/400+latin/200); github=whitespace-token ceil(wordCount/200) which under-counts Chinese. Reconciled to the CJK-aware formula (§11.4) for both posts create and github sync.

Cookie SameSite conflict: auth=Strict always; frontend=Lax in dev so cross-origin localhost refresh works. Reconciled: SameSite=Strict in prod (same-origin via nginx), Lax in dev (cross-origin localhost).
auth login/refresh response shape vs frontend: frontend needs expiresIn. Reconciled: login returns {accessToken,user,expiresIn}; refresh returns {accessToken,expiresIn}.
id strategy: posts manual=slugify(title), works manual=nanoid(12). Kept domain-specific (intentional: blog SEO URLs vs portfolio), documented in §11.5. Both github=filename stem verbatim.
tags field: github draft adds posts.tags; posts draft does not mention. Reconciled: tags is ADDITIVE (parsed from frontmatter by sync), not yet surfaced in frontend v1.

users collection ownership: scaffolding owns the core seed contract (username/passwordHash/role/isActive/timestamps); auth consumes it and adds refresh rotation state in a SEPARATE refreshTokens collection. Documented to prevent a circular scaffold<->auth dependency.
